paper_metadata.title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
paper_metadata.abstract: Contrastive models like CLIP have been shown to learn robust representations of images that capture both semantics and style. To leverage these representations for image generation, we propose a two-stage model: a prior that generates a CLIP image embedding given a text caption, and a decoder that generates an image conditioned on the image embedding. We show that explicitly generating image representations improves image diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity. Our decoders conditioned on image representations can also produce variations of an image that preserve both its semantics and style, while varying the non-essential details absent from the image representation. Moreover, the joint embedding space of CLIP enables language-guided image manipulations in a zero-shot fashion. We use diffusion models for the decoder and experiment with both autoregressive and diffusion models for the prior, finding that the latter are computationally more efficient and produce higher-quality samples.

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a diffusion-based prior model to generate CLIP image embeddings from text captions, improving computational efficiency and sample quality compared to autoregressive priors. The model leverages the joint embedding space of CLIP for zero-shot language-guided image manipulations.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Pairs of images and corresponding captions
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image variation, language-guided image manipulation, high-resolution image synthesis (64x64 to 1024x1024)
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Diffusion-based prior for generating CLIP image embeddings from text captions
extraction_data.extension: Diffusion priors trained in latent space achieve comparable performance to autoregressive priors while being more compute-efficient. The model uses classifier-free guidance by randomly dropping conditioning information during training.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces an autoregressive prior model that converts CLIP image embeddings into discrete codes and predicts them conditioned on text captions. This enables hierarchical text-conditional image generation but is less compute-efficient than the diffusion prior variant.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Pairs of images and corresponding captions
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image variation, language-guided image manipulation
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Autoregressive prior for generating CLIP image embeddings from text captions
extraction_data.extension: The autoregressive prior converts CLIP image embeddings into a sequence of discrete codes for prediction, enabling hierarchical generation but with higher computational cost compared to diffusion priors.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: A diffusion-based decoder that inverts CLIP image embeddings to generate images, enabling non-deterministic image variations while preserving semantics and style. The decoder supports classifier-free guidance for improved sample quality.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Pairs of images and corresponding captions
extraction_data.application: Image variation, text-to-image generation, high-resolution image synthesis (64x64 to 1024x1024), semantic image manipulation
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Diffusion-based image generation conditioned on CLIP image embeddings and optionally text captions
extraction_data.extension: The decoder conditions on CLIP embeddings and optionally text captions, using classifier-free guidance and diffusion upsamplers to generate high-resolution images. It introduces corruption techniques (e.g., Gaussian blur, BSR degradation) during training to improve upsampler robustness.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: A diffusion upsampler model that increases image resolution from 64x64 to 256x256, trained with Gaussian blur corruption to improve robustness and generalization.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: High-resolution images with conditioning on lower-resolution inputs
extraction_data.extension: The upsampler uses Gaussian blur corruption during training to improve robustness and is trained on random crops of images to reduce computational cost while generalizing to full resolution at inference.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: A diffusion upsampler model that increases image resolution from 256x256 to 1024x1024, trained with BSR degradation to improve robustness and generalization.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: High-resolution images with conditioning on lower-resolution inputs
extraction_data.extension: The upsampler uses BSR degradation during training to improve robustness and is trained on random crops of images to reduce computational cost while generalizing to full resolution at inference.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Autoregressive (AR) prior model that converts CLIP image embeddings into a sequence of discrete codes, conditioned on text captions and CLIP text embeddings, with PCA-based dimensionality reduction for efficiency and classifier-free guidance for improved sample quality.
extraction_data.application: Image generation from text captions, image variations, interpolations, and text-guided image manipulations
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Autoregressive prediction of discrete CLIP image embeddings
extraction_data.extension: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) reduces CLIP image embedding dimensionality from 1,024 to 319 principal components, preserving nearly all information while improving training stability and inference efficiency. The model also conditions on the quantized dot product between text and image embeddings to favor higher text-image alignment.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Diffusion prior model that directly predicts unnoised CLIP image embeddings using a decoder-only Transformer, conditioned on text captions and CLIP text embeddings, with classifier-free guidance for improved sample quality.
extraction_data.application: Image generation from text captions, image variations, interpolations, and text-guided image manipulations
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Gaussian diffusion modeling of continuous CLIP image embeddings
extraction_data.extension: The diffusion prior uses a decoder-only Transformer trained to predict the unnoised CLIP image embedding directly (instead of epsilon prediction), with mean-squared error loss. During sampling, two samples are generated, and the one with the higher dot product with the text embedding is selected for better alignment.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Hierarchical text-conditional image generation using CLIP latents, with an autoregressive (AR) prior to model the distribution of CLIP image embeddings given a caption, enabling high-quality image synthesis with improved semantic alignment and diversity.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Diffusion-based image generation conditioned on CLIP latents
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam with corrected weight decay and momentum β1=0.9
extraction_data.extension: The AR prior explicitly predicts principal components of CLIP image embeddings in a specific order, enabling progressive reconstruction of semantic information from coarse to fine-grained details.
extraction_data.research_problem: Text-conditional image generation with improved photorealism, caption similarity, and sample diversity
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image reconstruction from CLIP latents, visualization of CLIP embedding space
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Hierarchical text-conditional image generation using a diffusion-based prior to model CLIP image embeddings, outperforming the AR prior in photorealism, caption similarity, and diversity while requiring less training compute.
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image reconstruction from CLIP latents, visualization of CLIP embedding space
extraction_data.research_problem: Text-conditional image generation with improved photorealism, caption similarity, and sample diversity
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Diffusion-based image generation conditioned on CLIP latents
extraction_data.extension: The diffusion prior models the distribution of CLIP image embeddings using a diffusion process, enabling more efficient and higher-quality generation compared to the autoregressive prior.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Diffusion-based decoder for generating high-resolution images from CLIP latents, improving photorealism and caption similarity over prior models like GLIDE.
extraction_data.application: Image generation from text prompts, inpainting, aesthetic-quality image synthesis
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam with corrected weight decay and momentum β1=0.999
extraction_data.extension: GLIDE-based architecture with learned sigma and 250 strided sampling steps for high-quality image synthesis.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Diffusion-based upsampler for increasing image resolution from 64x64 to 256x256, using cosine noise schedule and Gaussian blur for improved image quality.
extraction_data.application: High-resolution image generation from low-resolution inputs
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam with corrected weight decay and momentum β1=0.999
extraction_data.extension: ADMNet-based architecture with 320 channels, 3 resblocks per resolution, and Gaussian blur for artifact reduction.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

extraction_data.innovation: Diffusion-based upsampler for increasing image resolution from 256x256 to 1024x1024, using linear noise schedule and BSR degradation for improved image quality.
extraction_data.application: High-resolution image generation from low-resolution inputs
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam with corrected weight decay and momentum β1=0.999
extraction_data.extension: ADMNet-based architecture with 192 channels, 2 resblocks per resolution, and BSR degradation for artifact reduction.
extraction_data.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
